articles.title: Smoke seen rising from direction of UAE energy facility
articles.content: The port is also home to a key oil export terminal. Local authorities, in a statement, said debris that fell after a successful drone interception had caused a fire, without specifying the location. Later at night, authorities said they were still battling the fire, adding that a Jordanian national had been injured.
articles.summary:
